news.title_en: Wall Street Got the Weak Jobs Report It Wanted. Chip Stocks Wrecked the Rally Anyway.
news.title_zh: Wall Street Got the Weak Jobs Report It Wanted. Chip Stocks Wrecked the Rally Anyway.
news.summary_en: Thursday's jobs report came in far below forecasts, initially easing pressure on the Federal Reserve, before a fresh slide in memory and semiconductor stocks dragged the Nasdaq lower even as the Dow closed at a record. Tesla sold off despite its best delivery quarter in years, healthcare names caught a bid, and SK Hynix lined up what would be the largest US listing ever by a foreign company.
news.summary_zh: Thursday's jobs report came in far below forecasts, initially easing pressure on the Federal Reserve, before a fresh slide in memory and semiconductor stocks dragged the Nasdaq lower even as the Dow closed at a record. Tesla sold off despite its best delivery quarter in years, healthcare names caught a bid, and SK Hynix lined up what would be the largest US listing ever by a foreign company.

news.title_en: Saints & Masters Acquires Xencia, Targets ₹1,000-Crore Revenue from Microsoft Cloud Business
news.title_zh: Saints & Masters Acquires Xencia, Targets ₹1,000-Crore Revenue from Microsoft Cloud Business
news.summary_en: Saints & Masters (S&M), a leading global technology advisory and execution firm with a strong focus on cloud services and AI-led innovation, has acquired the entire stake in the Bengaluru-based cloud and AI solutions provider Xencia Technology Solutions, adding deep Microsoft capabilities to its growing multicloud practice. With the acquisition, S&M is targeting revenue of over ₹1,000 crore from its Microsoft Cloud business over the next few years, reflecting its ambition to become a key enabler

With the acquisition, S&M is targeting revenue of over ₹1,000 crore from its Microsoft Cloud business over the next few years, reflecting its ambition to become a key enabler

news.title_en: Aliphatic Hydrocarbon Market to Hit $6.81 Billion by 2032 with 4.4% CAGR
news.title_zh: Aliphatic Hydrocarbon Market to Hit $6.81 Billion by 2032 with 4.4% CAGR
news.summary_en: The global aliphatic hydrocarbon solvents and thinners market is forecasted to grow from USD 5.26 billion in 2026 to USD 6.81 billion by 2032, with a 4.4% CAGR. This expansion is driven by rising demand in industries like coatings, adhesives, and industrial maintenance. The mineral spirits segment leads, fueled by its extensive industrial application, particularly in paints and coatings. Significant growth in the Asia Pacific is supported by construction, automotive, and packaging industries. Ke
news.summary_zh: The global aliphatic hydrocarbon solvents and thinners market is forecasted to grow from USD 5.26 billion in 2026 to USD 6.81 billion by 2032, with a 4.4% CAGR. This expansion is driven by rising demand in industries like coatings, adhesives, and industrial maintenance. The mineral spirits segment leads, fueled by its extensive industrial application, particularly in paints and coatings. Significant growth in the Asia Pacific is supported by construction, automotive, and packaging industries. Ke

news.summary_en: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:REGN) received FDA acceptance with Priority Review for cemdisiran in generalized myasthenia gravis. The EMA has also accepted the marketing application for cemdisiran, aligning regulatory review on both sides of the Atlantic. Phase 3 trial data for cemdisiran were published in The Lancet, providing peer reviewed clinical evidence for the therapy. Regeneron Pharmaceuticals comes into this news with its stock at $654.27 and a mixed recent track record,...
